{{CargoOrgan
|name=Basic Digital Axon
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10828
|idx=29
|description=The latest product from Super Gene Company—bio-integrated digital components to aid lifeform evolution. Requires a LifeFirewall™ subscription. We are not liable for any virus-related fatalities.
|skill=
|hp=1110
|def=127
|atk=81
|rush=99
|gene1=Snail Arena, Wind DMG +60
|gene2=Snail Arena, All ELMT RES +20
|gene3=Snail Arena, DMG REDUC +2%
|gene7=Snail Arena, DMG REDUC +2% (Awakened)
|}}
